name: Bolognese Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 1 1/2-quart saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until the onion is translucent.
3. Add carrot and celery; sauté for about 2 minutes.
4. Add ground veal and cook, stirring constantly with a fork, until the meat is crumbly and loses its pink color.
5. Stir in the diced tomatoes and skim milk. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently, until some of the liquid has evaporated, about 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and let simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is thick and creamy, about 30 minutes.
Makes 4 servings, approximately 3/4 cup each.
